DP.159.0000:
Have you gone underground lately?\f
Depending on where you go down,
you end up in different places.\f
That’s why I use my Explorer Kit
in as many places as I can.
DP.159.0001:
The Spheres found in the underground
tunnels are like gems.\f
You can obtain goodies by trading
the Spheres away.
DP.159.0002:
If you bury Spheres, they grow
a little every day.\f
They’re really weird that way.\f
Oh, right! I’d better dig mine up!
I forgot I had some buried!
DP.159.0003:
Get Flags from your friends to make
your Secret Base better.\f
Try to hide your Secret Base, and
get good at ferreting out your\r
friend’s bases.
DP.159.0004:
Go underground and have fun down
there. Make it an adventure!
DP.159.0005:
Some underground Traps need to be
defused by touch or by using the\r
microphone!
DP.159.0006:
The Underground Man in Eterna and
Byron of Canalave are related.\f
Add Byron’s son Roark, and you have
a trio of dedicated diggers.
